scope: Add a promotion-review layer for focused MiroFish hybrid runs and emit the first enterprise-response promotion brief

decision_context.prior_state: The repo could discover, canonicalize, benchmark, and run hybrid evaluations, but promotion into the maintained benchmark universe was still being handled only through manual notes.
decision_context.decision: Add a repo-local promotion brief command and use it to compare the strongest enterprise-response candidates from the focused run before any benchmark-review proposal.
decision_context.why_now: The focused benchmark batch identified a clear frontier leader and the next question is promotion priority, not broader discovery.

files_expected.purpose: Adds promotion-brief generation on top of a saved hybrid run.
Exposes the promotion-brief generator as a CLI command.
Documents how promotion review should be run and interpreted.
Links the hybrid run flow to the promotion-review step.
Makes the promotion-review operator path explicit in the discovery factory plan.
Stores the first enterprise-response promotion brief.
Summarizes the promotion recommendation in operator-readable form.
Captures the request, scope, and verification plan for this tranche.

planned_steps: Add a promotion-brief builder to the MiroFish hybrid module
Expose a CLI command for promotion review
Run the promotion brief on the focused enterprise-response hybrid run
Save the research note and update the transparent tranche logs

expected_checks: The promotion brief nominates exactly one domain for human benchmark review
The benchmark summary remains visible in the saved packet
The governance note explicitly prevents auto-promotion

guardrails: Keep all output in exploratory_frontier / operator-review lanes
Do not modify unrelated benchmark artifacts
